sections.locator: Sheet Process FMEA / Row OP30-Internal Leakage
sections.heading: Internal Leakage Failure Mode
sections.text: Internal Leakage can reduce brake booster performance. Automatic leak testing at OP30 is the detection control.

sections.heading: Causal Evidence Boundary
sections.text: The OP20 bottleneck candidate does not establish that queue or cycle time caused an OP30 Leak Rate increase. Correlated time-series, controlled trials and equipment/fixture evidence are required.

sections.heading: Risk Actions
sections.text: Containment, master-leak verification, fixture inspection and program-version verification are required after action-limit exceedance.
